texto: Before I could process the question, from the back side was a soft 'snick" as the cross was adjusted to my height and the ankle clamps latched down. My hands were free, but I wasn't going anywhere. My gasp must have been audible as this was not part of my design, but I was thinking I needed to have mine re-fitted.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Abyrne Mostyn sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Before I could process the question, from the back side was a soft 'snick" as the cross was adjus…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, abyrne-mostyn, bdsm, útil em momentos de bdsm.

My hands were free, but I wasn't going anywhere. My gasp must have been audible as this was not part of my design, but I was thinking I needed to have mine re-fitted.
